title: 8,16,20,24,40 Pack Handcrafted Triple Layer Luxury Coordinating Xmas Gift Tags (Hand Crafted Gift Tags Style 1 Pack of 24)
features: [Christmas Wishes]: The gift tags not only can be a decoration to a gift or any other usages, but also can spread the sincere wishes to your friends or family members, let them feel warm during the holiday time.

[Perfect For]: Easy to hang with the compatible twine strings, Can be used for Christmas, birthday, wedding, graduation or various holidays, can also be used as gift tags, bookmarks, handmade, DIY projects, etc.

[Material]: The material of tag is high quality card paper, smooth to write and not easy to break; The twine string is durable and sturdy, can last for a long time use. Ideal addition for Christmas gift, boxes, tree ornaments, bottle decorations and so on

[Package Details]: Triple Layer Tags Pack of 8, Jingle Bells 16 Packs, Hand Crafted Gift Tags Style 1, Hand Crafted Gift Tags Style 2, Giant Gift Tags, Co-ordinating Gift Tags 4 Style. These are the Different Styles we have. All the styles are qualty assure.

[Multi-Purpose]: This Christmas gift tag is not only suitable for Christmas gift box, but also suitable for pasting on gift wrapping paper, windows, greeting cards, and envelopes to create an atmosphere for your Christmas decorations.
description: Christmas Gift Tags, with Rope for Presents Wrapping Different Merry Christmas Hanging Labels for Holiday Gifts, Many Designs Christmas Gift Tags with String for Seasonal Favors, Xmas Parties and Celebrations
